name: Mini-B Sparky Aqua
comment: Step into the future with Mini-B Sparky Aqua—a true game-changer in the world of compact, lightweight mini moving-heads! This IP66-rated fixture is causing a stir, and for good reason: prepare to be hypnotized by the powerful strobe effects of Mini-B Sparky Aqua!

capabilities.comment: Wake Linearly Increase of Pixel Back to Front
